textByHashes.a7f162a9c421552071c16434e5fe0dc8ab1b7580: Sorry citizen. Only Knights of Ardougne are allowed in the prison.
textByHashes.5f9bdc31f25069e79fc6275cf48f0afa80df7e09: Hello there citizen. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.20d4b1903c7907b01355be59805801771f23d23b: These stairs lead to the Ardougne Prison. It's home to thieves, murderers and everything in between.
textByHashes.7b345a2cfec3e13e9a64077215d5498e4ba4570d: I'm afraid not citizen. Only the Knights of Ardougne are allowed into the prison and I can see that you are no knight.
textByHashes.2645e0723995f4ef5734506c5908730fd8c76714: Hello there fellow knight. Isn't today a wonderful day to be a Knight of Ardougne?
textByHashes.e8ddc0f5eadcd12233f4f4bd0ebb1e60c49bff27: That they are fellow knight, that they are.
textByHashes.49a283a833cadd68065d7e51cea1e2693abc5ddb: Of course you can! You're a Knight of Ardougne! There is no place where you can't go.
textByHashes.fc780a7508b6c85f14049bc72f341ca4915d6124: You don't look much like a Tim.
textByHashes.c0ef537fa7589214e5be0e5de10e4cc4ad755033: You don't look much like a Sue.
textByHashes.eb321089cf87f505e0bea780bf9f6e9c8493eb5b: You don't look much like a Sam.
textByHashes.e8a88d93f6dd78b96c0f940967c471db260d66f9: What are you doing here... Tim?
textByHashes.47f2f12acd14ffe1bfcf7d754c65bb1f2ea5f9f3: What are you doing here... Sue?
textByHashes.f6b507038c7b8651241c03a9ebec9ed998589500: What are you doing here... Sam?
textByHashes.d747f95fdd5a40f3aa0a0fa29d8abb324c209974: Hmm... Very well. As you were... Tim...
textByHashes.5fec2f49f1a7e5539b5775d7a63f8c0d9b4428f1: Hmm... Very well. As you were... Sue...
textByHashes.0e7d88b46eea15b16e005d268151878baef73027: Hmm... Very well. As you were... Sam...
textByHashes.66c980c90dcac7bb02bec8f75497350aed3c28e2: Hmm... Is your head working okay today Tim?
textByHashes.0d30558ff17a85e247ca5ea2bbeccb9d3b2ffcd6: Hmm... Is your head working okay today Sue?
textByHashes.35c40462c6fb13b01d0c2f537b5a8f74e4d5e87e: Hmm... Is your head working okay today Sam?
